item.title: I never thought I would make it this far…
item.description: It wasn’t an easy ride. I had to fund my own degree and accomodation by creating a tutoring business. I couch hopped and borrowed money from friends to get here. But I’m here, and past me would be so very very proud and impressed. We made it.
item.dc:creator: JoleneJoleneJoleneJoleeene

item.title: Shut up and take my dinero
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Catchy sappy story
item.description:
We met in Jr high and we’re good friends then dated, married and kids. Life was great even with the ups and downs. We have traveled the US, built great careers, even been successful porn stars(another story), been successful in life, everything looks great for us.
People have issues, and no one is perfect, but her whole life she has been battling her inner demons and we tackled them, counseling, therapy, meds have all been tried
After 22 years together, 17 years married, and 2 great kids, she admitted defeat and can’t keep hurting me and lying to herself and needs to leave. I just lost my best friend, person I love, and my family (her family has always been there for me and still are, but won’t be the same) if you truly love someone you have to let them go. We have tried counseling in the past, she has been to so many counselors in the past and really tried, but breaks my heart that feelings are still there and it has to end.
Son came by and left me a crisis number hotline number to call. He has never seen his dad a mess, I’ve been the cool calm rational one. Now I’m a mess. Kids are keeping me going and strong, their mom and I are on good terms and working to make sure they know they are number one and that we are here too for them
Shameless plug, thanks everyone for keeping me going with your posts, stories, and memes. Feel free to reach out or whatever, new to having a account
item.dc:creator: spaceskull333

item.title: Dreams DO come true!
item.description: I served the hiring manager of a local company that makes solar paneling for satellites and other space stuff. Got offered an interview! Got the job, and am now officially certified in NASA Standard 8739, Polymerics. This is literally a dream come true! This will hopefully be the first of many certificates I'll receive!

item.title: Fair pay rules
item.description: i work at a bar, and do not get big amounts of tip, but on the other hand, im paid fairly for a student job, and am not dependant on having shifts with great costumer flow, and tips are just a nice addition i sometimes get, but definately not the norm.

item.description: Volume 96 of basically free* memes! I hope your Sunday has been as filled with naps as mine has.
item.dc:creator: MCKnowsTooManyFactsAboutBees

item.title: The Sweetheart Dance
item.description: My absolute Favourite to watch. In my experience, sweetheart dances are rare. The choreography! The matching regalia! When I was younger, I was always drawn to the songs, the dances, the regalia. But my parents were badly affected by the residential schools they went to, so we all missed out on this aspect of our culture. They rediscovered their spirituality in their later years. We do ceremonies, but we don't dance. I'm actually quite a good leather worker and traditional beadworker; I could very well make my own regalia. However, I'm SUPER busy at work (IT specialist) and actually in school part time (for financial management). Some day, I will dance. Sorry, I do not know the dancers, the year, or the location. If you can note credit, please do so! This is not my video. A friend posted it on fb and I thought you guys would like to see it! Edit - special thanks to @maxwilder for finding the source! Seminole Powwow 2020 in Fort Lauderdale, Florida https://youtu.be/ry58_SFpYoU
item.dc:creator: LeafofGreen

item.title: Memes I send my best friend pt 3. We are doing great. Just fine. Still totally OK. Yupperoo.
item.description:
Don't even fucking get me started.
This has provided endless jokes and entertainment and every time I see it I laugh embarrassingly hard.
Ope.
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
I really do. Luckily we are gonna see each other SOOOOOON. Whether she knows it or not. Get ready bitch.
OK byeeeeeeeee.

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #4
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belongs to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months at most. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u We have some unfortunate news regarding Louie, he passed away this weekend after a sudden severe illness. The vet suspected Evans Syndrome and prescribed a number of medications, but unfortunately Louie died before they could take effect. Louie went to the vet Thursday afternoon and died Friday night. Paul is beside himself and heartbroken over the sudden loss of his best friend. Please snuggle your pets extra close tonight, give them an extra treat or a good ear scratch ❤️ and get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp
item.dc:creator: WILLPMYOUYOURDESIRES

item.title: Carefully curated, easily-read Ukraine news with sources, for those lacking time but seeking info.
item.description:
Very similar to what was done under the USSR. It is a war crime to forcibly relocate noncombatants. They're being taken to camps and the occupiers are removing their phones, documents, and passports off their persons. https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/ukraines-mariupol-says-russia-forcefully-deported-thousands-its-people-2022-03-20/ https://nypost.com/2022/03/19/thousands-of-ukrainians-forcibly-taken-to-russian-camps-reports/ https://kyivindependent.com/uncategorized/mariupol-council-russian-occupiers-forcibly-move-mariupol-residents-to-russia/ https://english.nv.ua/nation/invaders-have-been-forcibly-moving-mariupol-residents-to-filtration-camps-in-russia-50226480.html EDIT: Since I shared this post, Russia has given Mariupol an ultimatum to surrender by 5:00am Moscow time March 21 (6:00pm PST March 20, or 1 hour from the time of this edit). They have not provided "or else" conditions outside of a "military tribunal" (...lol...) for remaining fighters after that time has gone, but it likely means they will step up their indiscriminate bombings yet again.
More war crimes, more violations of the Geneva convention. Worse still, these are untrained civilians who will just be more cannon fodder, many of whom are very young (this is part of the point, indoctrination – remember the Hitler Youth, anyone?). They're doing this in the Crimean peninsula as well. https://kyivindependent.com/national/russia-throws-untrained-civilians-from-occupied-donbas-into-hot-spots-of-its-war-in-ukraine/ https://euromaidanpress.com/2021/12/12/russia-continues-to-coerce-crimeans-into-its-military-and-punishes-those-that-resist/ https://khpg.org/en/1608810085 https://www.vice.com/en/article/5dgqen/russia-conscripts-ukraine-invasion-volunteers https://meduza.io/en/feature/2022/02/27/stay-hidden-or-get-drafted
The Governor of Luhansk, Сергій Гайдай (Serhiy Haidai) reports on this incident. 15 people survived, but we do not have an update on their condition or possible injuries. It was done with a tank, which means it was not some aimless shelling from artillery miles away, but by soldiers who could see what they were shooting at. https://www.ukrinform.net/rubric-ato/3434931-enemy-shells-nursing-home-in-kreminna-killing-56.html https://kyivindependent.com/uncategorized/death-toll-at-56-in-russian-tank-attack-at-nursing-home-in-luhansk-oblast/https://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2022/03/20/7333028/ https://www.facebook.com/sergey.gaidai.loga/posts/138026882070037
As with the theatre, there are likely hundreds dead, and there are few resources to try to rescue those that are buried but survived. City authorities say 130 people were rescued. https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/europe/urkaine-russia-mariupol-bombing-school-b2039850.html https://www.cnn.com/2022/03/20/europe/russia-invasion-ukraine-03-20-intl/index.html https://apnews.com/article/russia-ukraine-zelenskyy-kyiv-business-europe-7d2f30478f5fb2d80ba6c38fef38129a
BBC's reported Lysa Doucet said: "The diplomats are talking, the negotiators are talking. And we understand they are making progress. And we understand President Putin has finally agreed that he will meet, at some point, President Zelensky who has been asking for a meeting since January. He hasn't said it in public, he says quite the opposite in public." https://www.bbc.com/news/world-europe-60785754 https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-10632811/Putin-agrees-meet-Zelensky-Russian-President-ready-talk-Ukrainian-leader.html https://www.cnn.com/2022/03/20/politics/zelensky-putin-ukraine-negotiations-war-cnntv/index.html Just a short update today. The start of the week will likely bring a larger quantity of news. For those that want to make donations to help Ukrainians, see the lists below. If you have additional (preferably *better*) places to donate, please let me know so I can check them out before adding to my posts. Before making donations, always be sure to read on where/how the donation money is spent. Humanitarian aid: https://www.unicef.org/ukraine/en http://r2p.org.ua/en/ https://www.hias.org/ https://www.pah.org.pl/en/ Military aid: https://bank.gov.ua/ua/news/all/natsionalniy-bank-vidkriv-spetsrahunok-dlya-zboru-koshtiv-na-potrebi-armiyi https://www.portmone.com.ua/r3/uk/terminal/index/index/id/118103 Multipurpose aid: https://razomforukraine.org/ EDIT: Since I shared this post, Russia has given Mariupol an ultimatum to surrender by 5:00am Moscow time March 21 (6:00pm PST March 20, or 1 hour from the time of this edit). They have not provided "or else" conditions outside of a "military tribunal" (...lol...) for remaining fighters after that time has gone, but it likely means they will step up their indiscriminate bombings yet again. It is also very likely that talks are canceled. https://i.imgur.com/51oWbGu.mp4
item.dc:creator: VikingWeightlifting

item.title: One of the best Tik Tok mashups I've seen
item.description:
Sorry for the split, imgur only allows 1 min video/GIF uploads (unmute)
I used my phone video editor. It was a bitch to edit just right.
